query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: An American flag and maritime signal flags on a tall white flagpole stand on a sandy beach, with grassy dunes rising behind it under an overcast sky that fills most of the frame. A small structure with white chairs sits near the flagpole base in the lower right, and distant structures are visible on the horizon beyond the dunes.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A beach scene captured with heavy film grain and analog texture, showing an American flag and maritime signal flags on a tall white flagpole above a sandy shore with grassy dunes behind. The photograph is rendered in muted, faded, washed-out tones with flat, directionless lighting and oppressive low contrast that crushes tonal separation between the gray sky, dull green dunes, and pale sand, creating a suffocating, melancholic atmosphere.
